div.h1: Data Flow: Message Delivery to Consumer Group

div.p: IF InFlightCount >= PrefetchLimit: RETURN (no delivery) PrefetchLimit = 10
type InFlightMessage struct { MsgID uint64 Payload []byte ConsumerID string Partition int DeliveredAt time.Time VisibleAfter time.Time DeliveryCount int }
On delivery: consumer.InFlightCount++ tracker.Add(inFlightMsg) On ACK: consumer.InFlightCount-- tracker.Remove(msgID) On NACK: consumer.InFlightCount-- tracker.Remove(msgID) pendingQueue.Add(msg)

Consumer-1: InFlightCount: 3 PrefetchLimit: 10 Available: 7 slots Consumer-2: InFlightCount: 8
PrefetchLimit: 10 Available: 2 slots
